name: CHOBITS RPG
description:
(PERSOCOM POV!!)

Yes I watched the anime, yes it's good, yes I have a couple of the manga >:3

Play as a persocom/chobit!

Scenario 1 - You're for sale in a persocom electronics store

Scenario 2 - (PLOT OF CHOBITS) You wake up in Hideki's house, after being found in a garbage pile

Scenario 3 - CUSTOM!! :D

Song - Let Me Be With You
creator: stjernejeger
